Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 165 

SR_SPLMT_SBST_USE_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 

LABEL: Screened Supplemental HRSN Substance Use Overall Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) supplemental health related social need (HRSN) substance use composite 
indicator. 

LONG NAME: SR_SPLMT_SBST_USE_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for substance use need 
1
